name: Ataxx
author: AGP
description: Ataxx, the 7x7 expansion / infection game. Each player starts with two pieces on opposite corners. Move one of your pieces onto an empty cell: clone into an adjacent cell (grow, keeping the original) or jump to a cell two away (relocating). Every opponent piece next to where you land is infected and flips to your colour. A player with no move passes; when neither side can move (or the board is full) the player with more pieces wins, equal counts draw.
